title: One Money Block
description: One Money Block is a mod that offers a unique and enjoyable gameplay experience based on a single block, with a completely new progression system built around money and upgrades.
body:
You start the game with only one block. Every time you break it, you earn money 💵
This money can be used to progress, unlock new features, and gradually improve your world.

![Money block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3f45cea937fdecfd8fd57bcaeb220d89023d13e.png)

The mod focuses on:

🎮 Simple and easy-to-understand gameplay

⏳ A constant sense of progression

💰 A system based on earning and spending money

😄 A fun and rewarding challenge for all players

![Shops](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a358349288cc859b2e2427f1aae70c5122c21b3e.png)

If you enjoy starting from nothing and building everything step by step,
One Money Block delivers a fun and engaging experience.
